title: Vanilla Redrawn!
description: Vanilla Redrawn a better vanilla experience
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c6b754fcdec3e6a5ff7b8ad75276f6808ed18d3.png)This modpack is a vanilla like game but with more adjustments and improvments. It basically makes the gameplay better.

**NOTE**: Playing with no music is always **PREFFERED**, enjoy the adventure and the ambient sounds.

Have Fun(:
